which will continue upto 58. Between 59-60, ill health will upset him. At 51-
52, he will perform religious functions at home and he will live up to 68-69.
As Mars is having Ketu in the 12th to him and Mercury in the second to him,
and the Sun has Saturn in the 8th to him, the native will have no likelihood
ofhaving brothers. His father will be short-lived and pass away while the
native will be just a boy of ten.
